title: Amtech P3398 300mm (12") combination square
features: HARDY AND LIGHTWEIGHT: This 300mm (12") combination square has a hardened and tempered lightweight aluminium blade with metric and inch graduations
SPIRIT LEVEL: With 90° and 45° marking angles, it has a built-in spirit level and scriber and is ideal for measuring, marking out and laying out tasks
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains Combination square See more
